title: Members
subtitle: Manage members and invitations for this organization

members.removeConfirmDescription: This person will lose access to this organization. Their past flip assignments are kept for history.

errors.cannotRemoveSelf: You can't remove yourself from here
errors.lastAdmin: Can't remove the last admin — promote another member first
errors.server: Something went wrong. Please try again.

invitations.reissueNote: The invite link is only shown when you create it. If you need it again, revoke and re-invite.

invite.title: Invite a member
invite.description: We'll generate a link tied to this email. The link is valid for 7 days.
invite.successDescription: Copy this link and send it to the invitee via LINE or your preferred channel. It expires in 7 days.

errors.duplicate: There is already a pending invitation for this email
errors.alreadyMember: This email is already a member
errors.server: Something went wrong. Please try again.

accept.title: Join organization
accept.emailLocked: You must sign up using this email

expired.title: This invitation has expired
expired.description: Please ask the admin for a new invite link.

invalid.title: Invalid invitation
invalid.description: The link may have been revoked or already used.

errors.emailMismatch: You must sign up with the email on the invitation
errors.alreadyMember: You're already a member of this organization
errors.emailTaken: This email already has an account. Please log in and re-open the invite link.
errors.server: Something went wrong. Please try again.
